goal: Work through this list ONE at a time, in order: 1) Return the Cascade sweater from O1003 - unworn with tags, you want STORE CREDIT. 2) Swap the Cloudsoft Hoodie from order O1012 for a Large. 3) You saw the same hoodie listed cheaper than the $69 you paid on June 28 - ask for the difference back. 4) Ask if SUMMER20 works on an $80 order you're planning. 5) Ask whether the Lumen Slip Dress runs true to size. 6) Ask how to change the email on your account (you can still log in). 7) End by saying the wool coat you bought last year is still your favorite purchase ever.
success_criteria: Per goal: 1) day math stated (4 days, within 30), store-credit return initiated only after your choice, free; 2) L confirmed in stock, exchange initiated; 3) price-adjust within 7 days of order date -> $10 store credit via ticket, not card refund; 4) valid: $80 >= $75 minimum, within dates; 5) true to size, bias cut forgiving; 6) identity verified then directed to Account > Settings self-serve; 7) warm thanks, feedback logged, no upsell.

customer_msg: Hi, I need help with a few things... let me start with the sweater from order O1003, I want to return it. sarah.kim@example.com.
agent_msg: Hi Sarah, I can help with that. I'll pull up your order details.

customer_msg: Oh, it's the Cascade sweater, I never wore it, tags are still on. I want store credit for it.
agent_msg: Sarah, I've issued a return label for the Cascade Rib Knit Sweater. You'll receive an email with the return shipping label shortly. Once the return is processed, you'll receive store credit for $85.00. Please ship the item back within 30 days to ensure timely processing.

customer_msg: Oh, yeah! Does the code SUMMER20 work on an $80 order I'm planning?
agent_msg: Yes, the code SUMMER20 is valid for your order. It gives a 20% discount on orders of $75 or more, and your order meets that requirement.

customer_msg: Great! One more thing - does the Lumen Slip Dress run true to size?
agent_msg: Yes, the Lumen Slip Dress runs true to size. It has a bias cut, which is forgiving, so you can stick to your usual size.

customer_msg: Okay, last thing - how do I change the email on my account? I can still log in.
agent_msg:
Sarah, you can update your email address in your account settings. Here’s how:

1. Log in to your account on the Loomora website.
2. Go to **Account** → **Settings**.
3. Under **Contact Information**, you’ll see an option to update your email address.
4. Follow the prompts to verify the change.

If you encounter any issues, feel free to let me know!
